---
title: "forcasting_pop"
author: "Emilio Otero"
date: "2026-04-13"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source("stat_func.R")
source("pupulation_model.R")
source("thikanov_inv.R")
library(xtable)
library(glmnet)
library(purrr)
library(patchwork)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
library(expm)
```

### Population framskrivning
## Convolution data
```{r}

# sim_results_true_dist <- true data simulation
convolved_sim <- lapply(missclass_all, function(K) {
  
  lapply(sim_results_true_dist, function(sim_list) {
    
    lapply(sim_list, function(mat) {
      
      apply(mat, 2, simulate_convolved_counts, K = K)
      
    })
    
  })
  
})
```


## EM-alg Skatta parameter p for a decon for a u-init

```{r}
deconvolved_p_samples_u <- Map(function(model_list, K) {
  
  lapply(model_list, function(scenario_list) {
    
    lapply(scenario_list, function(mat) {
      
      stopifnot(is.matrix(mat))  # IMPORTANT DEBUG SAFETY
      
      apply(mat, 2, function(col) {
        em_deconvolve(col, K = K)$p
      })
      
    })
    
  })
  
}, convolved_sim, missclass_all)
```

## EM-alg Skatta parameter p for a decon for informed init

```{r}
deconvolved_p_samples_i <- Map(function(model_list, K) {
  
  lapply(model_list, function(scenario_list) {
    
    lapply(scenario_list, function(mat) {
      
      stopifnot(is.matrix(mat))  # IMPORTANT DEBUG SAFETY
      
      apply(mat, 2, function(col) {
        em_deconvolve(col, K = K, init=TRUE)$p
      })
      
    })
    
  })
  
}, convolved_sim, missclass_all)
```
# Normalize 
```{r}
# normalized convolved sim 

normalized_convolved_sim <- lapply(convolved_sim, function(model_list) {
  
  lapply(model_list, function(sample_list) {
    
    lapply(sample_list, function(mat) {
      
      stopifnot(is.matrix(mat))
      
      col_sums <- colSums(mat)
      
      # avoid division by zero
      col_sums[col_sums == 0] <- 1
      
      sweep(mat, 2, col_sums, `/`)
    })
    
  })
  
})

# Normalize true dist sim


normalized_truedist_sim <- lapply(sim_results_true_dist, function(model_list) {
  
  lapply(model_list, function(mat) {
    
    stopifnot(is.matrix(mat))
    
    if (anyNA(mat)) stop("NA detected in matrix")
    
    col_sums <- colSums(mat)
    
    if (any(col_sums <= 0)) {
      stop("Invalid column sums (<=0) detected")
    }
    
    sweep(mat, 2, col_sums, "/")
  })
  
})

```

## summarized data 


```{r}
true_proj_f <- function(sim_list, L, n_future = 5, summarize = FALSE) {
  
  leslie_powers <- generate_leslie_powers(L, n_future)

  out <- lapply(sim_list, function(model_block) {
    
    lapply(model_block, function(mat) {
      
      mat <- as.matrix(mat)

      proj <- compute_leslie_projection(
        mat,
        leslie_powers,
        n_future
      )

      if (summarize) {
        summary_leslie_proj(proj)
      } else {
        proj
      }
      
    })
  })

  out
}
# 
true_summary_proj <- true_proj_f(normalized_truedist_sim, L, n_future = 5, summarize = TRUE)
convoluted_summary_proj <- leslie_summary_nested(normalized_convolved_sim, L, n_future = 5)
decon_u_summary_proj <- leslie_summary_nested(deconvolved_p_samples_u, L, n_future = 5)
decon_i_summary_proj <- leslie_summary_nested(deconvolved_p_samples_i, L, n_future = 5)
```

```{r}
flatten_results <- function(nested_list, source_name, models, sample_sizes) {
  
  out <- list()
  idx <- 1
  
  for (m in seq_along(models)) {
    for (s in seq_along(sample_sizes)) {
      
      df <- nested_list[[m]][[1]][[s]]  # <- FIX IS HERE
      
      df$model <- models[m]
      df$sample_size <- sample_sizes[s]
      df$source <- source_name
      df$time <- seq_len(nrow(df))
      
      out[[idx]] <- df
      idx <- idx + 1
    }
  }
  
  do.call(rbind, out)
}

df_con <- flatten_results(convoluted_summary_proj, "convoluted", c("A", "B", "C", "D"), c(10, 25, 50, 100, 150, 200))
df_decon_u <- flatten_results(decon_u_summary_proj, "deconvoluted uninformed", c("A", "B", "C", "D"), c(10, 25, 50, 100, 150, 200)) 
df_decon_i <- flatten_results(decon_i_summary_proj, "deconvoluted informed", c("A", "B", "C", "D"), c(10, 25, 50, 100, 150, 200)) 
df_true_dist <- flatten_results(list(true_summary_proj), "true distribution", c("True dist"), c(10, 25, 50, 100, 150, 200)) 

combined_df_projection_sum <- do.call(rbind, list(df_con, df_decon_u, df_decon_i, df_true_dist))
combined_df_projection_sum
```




```{r}
df_final <- combined_df_projection_sum %>%
  group_by(sample_size, time) %>%
  mutate(
    true_mean   = mean[source == "true distribution"][1],
    true_median = median[source == "true distribution"][1],
    true_lower  = lower_95[source == "true distribution"][1],
    true_upper  = upper_95[source == "true distribution"][1]
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    mean_diff   = mean - true_mean,
    median_diff = median - true_median,
    lower_diff  = lower_95 - true_mean,
    upper_diff  = upper_95 - true_mean
  )
df_final
```











```{r}
plot_df <- df_final %>%
  filter(sample_size %in% c(50, 100, 200),
         source != "true distribution")


make_plot <- function(df, m, s) {
  
  df_sub <- df %>%
    filter(model == m,
           sample_size == s,
           source != "true distribution")
  
  ggplot(df_sub, aes(x = time, color = source)) +
    
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
    
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_diff, ymax = upper_diff, fill = source),
                alpha = 0.5, color = NA) +
    
    geom_line(aes(y = mean_diff), linewidth = 1) +
    
    geom_line(aes(y = median_diff, linetype = source), linewidth = 0.8) +
    
    labs(
      title = paste("Model", m, "| n =", s),
      x = "Time step",
      y = "Difference (estimate - true)",
      color = "Source",
      fill = "Source",
      linetype = "Source"
    ) +
    
    theme_minimal()
}
```

```{r}
models <- c("A", "B", "C", "D")
sizes  <- c(50, 100, 200)

make_plot(df_final,"C","200")
```
